title: Survive
description: Spice up survival gameplay with thirst, sleep and more mechanics
body:
SUMMARY
Survive is a mod that adds various features to enhance the difficulty and realism of Minecraft! It adds such features as Thirst, Stamina, Temperature, Hygiene, Nutrition, Sleep, and Well-being! There is an in-game guide (requires Patchouli) you can get craftable with 3 paper and a plank, this guide delves into a bit more detail on various mechanics not explained here. 

 

CONTESTS
This mod has participated in DechModContest

 

MECHANICS

Thirst - You now have a thirst bar positioned above your hunger bar. You must keep it replenished by drinking water and other such fluids. The bar acts much like hunger; if you fail to keep it full, you will begin to die of thirst. You can quickly get water by crouching and right-clicking a water source block or by drinking a bottle of water. However, to avoid the Thirst effect purify the water through smelting or drink a potion. The Thirst effect causes your thirst bar to drop faster, much like Hunger for the hunger bar. If wellbeing is enabled alongside this module and you get the Thirst effect you will fall ill after a while.

 

Temperature - Your body temperature will be influenced by how hot or how cold your current biome and the blocks around you are. Vanilla armor will increase your temperature as well as how fast you heat up. Wearing wool armor will increase your resistance to cold temperatures, and using stiffened honey armor will improve your resistance to heat. Getting too cold will freeze you while getting too hot will roast you. If you stay cold or hot for too long while Wellbeing is enabled you will get hypothermia or hyperthermia respectively, which will consume your health and stamina until you have 28% health and stamina left. By default, your temperature is displayed as a tint on your Hotbar but can be changed to a bar meter atop your screen or number value in the config file.

 

Sleep - You will now require sleep to function properly. If you refuse to sleep for days at a time, your body will start to shut down. This will lead to debuffs influencing your movement speed and other functions, as well as restricting your vision gradually. You can drink caffeinated/sugary drinks to grant yourself the Energized effect, which reverses tiredness and gives various effects.

 

Stamina - Certain actions you perform in your world will now lower your new stamina bar upon performing. Your stamina can be replenished by standing still, walking rather than running, or lying in a bed. Sleeping fills the meter completely. When you run out of stamina, the meter will turn red and you will see three red stamina slots. This is your reserve stamina, which is a clear indicator that you will die if you work your body much more. Once your reserve stamina runs out, you will swiftly proceed to die of exhaustion.

 

CONFIG

Each and every mechanic can be disabled in the config file. Some can additionally be altered to change how much certain aspects of the game impact Survive's mechanics.

 

DATA PACKS

Almost anything item or biome-related you want to tweak with this mod can be manipulated via datapacks. If you're interested in creating datapacks, going to the page here should equip you with what you need to know about modifying the mod to work in the manner you want it to. If you're not, but you still want to use these datapacks, you could visit my discord server and look in the submissions channel for packs that other people have created or there might be packs floating around the internet that you could download. You could also visit if you don't necessarily understand the contents of the guide. I'm also going to point out, please do not request that I add support for x mods food. If you want x food to work with this mod, you're going to either need to add it yourself or ask the owner of the mod whose food you want to add to do it

  

CREDITS

I'd like to give my thanks to all my patrons on Patreon. It's thanks to their support that I still actively make these mods, so here they are:
